info.english_meaning: to swearto curseto shout to abuse
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAM pfTag rUpeRa sTApitaH nAsti parantu 1.355 biw ityatra 'hiwa ityeke' iti pAWaBedarUpeRa nirdizwaH vartate
